recentArticles.title: MGK Shares Cute Pics of Baby Saga Blade on Daughter’s First Birthday - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # MGK Shares Cute Pics of Baby Saga Blade on Daughter’s First Birthday. MGK is sharing pics from his infant daughter Saga Blade’s first birthday celebration. The “Cliché” singer posted a series of snaps of his second-born little one on Wednesday (April 1), obscuring the face of the child he shares with ex actress Megan Fox in a photo carousel of images from the baby’s first year. Elsewhere, MGK (born Colson Baker), 35, and Saga ride a mini-train at what looks like a carnival, take a daddy-daughter nap, dress up for Halloween as Jack Skellington and a little monster, swing on swings and celebrate Christmas with Casie in matching holiday onesies. News*, a day earlier during an Instagram Live, MGK revealed the cute nickname he has for Saga when he said “Hi, princess,” asking the little one if she wanted to “jam” with him.

recentArticles.title: Jaafar Jackson says memories of uncle Michael Jackson are 'wonderful' - USA Today
recentArticles.snippet: Jaafar Jackson was just 12 when Michael Jackson died in 2009, but the Hollywood newcomer can still recall the "wonderful times" he had with his superstar uncle. In his first TV interview ahead of the release of the Antoine Fuqua biopic "Michael" on April 24, in which Jaafar plays Jackson, the 29-year-old actor on April 2 briefly reminisced about his childhood on "Today with Jenna & Sheinelle.". ## Katherine Jackson 'couldn't tell if it was me or Michael': Jaafar Jackson. Jaafar – the second youngest son of Jermaine Jackson, Michael's brother and former Jackson 5 member – told the hosts that he's received "heartwarming" support from his father and the rest of his family, including grandmother Katherine Jackson. The 95-year-old Jackson family matriarch saw the film and "said how excellent I did and how much I embodied Michael," Jaafar shared. "Michael" is releasing against the backdrop of ongoing legal battles between Jackson's sexual assault accusers and his estate.
recentArticles.summary: Jaafar Jackson在首次電視採訪中分享了與已故叔叔Michael Jackson的美好回憶，並透露家人對他飾演Michael Jackson的傳記電影給予了溫馨支持。

recentArticles.title: Album Premiere: Gardenia – ‘Self-Titled’ - New Noise Magazine
recentArticles.snippet: # Album Premiere: Gardenia – ‘Self-Titled’. Gardenia are sharing their new self-titled full-length record, which deals with absence, the subtle ways intimacy erodes under fame and media, and the constant signal overload of modern life. The album was co-produced by Grammy-nominated producer Jack Shirley and the band themselves. The record reflects New York’s evolving heavy indie movement. Listen to the album here:. Gardenia was formed by born-and-bred New Yorkers, singer/bassist Ryan Zakin and drummer Tamir Malik. The duo met each other while working in a Manhattan recording studio. The new record proves how strong their musical bond is, and they aim to continue it for the upcoming days. *Photo courtesy of Michelle Lobianco*. ###### Stay Connected. ###### Subscribe. ### New Noise Print Subscription. Subscribe to receive physical monthly issues in the mail! This website uses cookies to ensure you get the best experience on our website.

recentArticles.title: Publishing Briefs: Bastian Langebaek Signs with Sony Music Publishing UK - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: **Sony Music Publishing UK**, in partnership with its JV partner **Second Songs**, signed a global publishing agreement with Copenhagen-based songwriter **Bastian Langebaek**, which includes future works. “I’m incredibly excited and grateful to sign a new publishing deal with Second Songs & Sony Music Publishing, getting to work once more with [Second Songs co-founder] **Mark Gale**, who I first signed with 11 years ago, a moment that changed everything,” said Langebaek in a statement. “Lykke Li is a generational talent who has consistently pushed the boundaries of pop music, not just in the Nordics but on the global stage,” **Lars Karlsson**, managing director of Warner Chappell Music Scandinavia, said in a statement. “We couldn’t be more excited to welcome Julianna Rankin into the Sony Music Publishing family alongside Big Loud Texas,” added **Anna Weisband**, senior vp, creative A&R, Sony Music Publishing Nashville. “Aya is a remarkable artist of rare sensitivity whose music has resonated around the world for nearly 10 years, reaching several generations,” **Matthieu Tessier,** managing director of Warner Chappell Music France, said in a statement.

recentArticles.title: Ja Morant Personal Announcement Reignites Miami Trade Rumors - Newsweek
recentArticles.snippet: # Ja Morant Personal Announcement Reignites Miami Trade Rumors. Once again, Ja Morant finds himself fueling the fire of what feels like an inevitable move away from Memphis. The Memphis Grizzlies star guard has reportedly listed his Memphis home for $3.5 million, a move that immediately rekindles questions about his long-term future with the franchise. And this latest personal decision only makes the idea of Morant playing in a Grizzlies jersey next season feel even more unbelievable. Back in December, Morant was listed as an executor of a trust that purchased a $3.2 million home in Miami-Dade County. That purchase came just weeks before the Feb. 5 trade deadline, when Morant’s name surfaced in league-wide discussions but ultimately remained in Memphis. The trade package sent Morant to Miami in exchange for veteran forward Andrew Wiggins and fifth-year guard Davion Mitchell. At this point, it feels like a lot less like "is Morant getting traded" and simply more of when. ## Donald Trump Gets Bad News Minutes After Iran War Speech.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞主要報導籃球員Ja Morant的交易傳聞，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: A Letter Of Forgiveness To My Neighbor, Who Went On TV To Mock My Faith - huffpost.com
recentArticles.snippet: "Jay, your campaign ad did not sound like justice. Why do we never attach the word “radical” to Christianity, Judaism, Hinduism, or Buddhism — or to any faith that humans manipulate to justify violence? My truest religion is love — the central message of all faiths. “Perhaps the better question is not who created whom, but why humans feel compelled to imagine the divine at all.”. Jay, your campaign ad did not sound like justice. When you say, “Allahu Akbar your butt back to the Middle East,” you are not speaking to extremists. I hope this letter opens your heart, Jay. This letter of forgiveness — of love and of the same humanity that we share. I hope it allows you to see this humanity in a Muslim father, neighbor and citizen who loves this country and this state fiercely. And I hope you leave with this: my Islam, my heart, my life, is a testimony of peace, love and forgiveness — far from anything you call “radical.”.
recentArticles.summary: 一封來自鄰居的公開信，批評一位名為「Jay」的人物在競選廣告中關於信仰與種族的爭議言論，同時表達寬恕與愛。

recentArticles.title: 'I'm Not the Most Strict': Jay Cutler Says You're Overthinking Your Form – and Missing Out on Muscle - menshealth.com
recentArticles.snippet: 2. 'I'm Not the Most Strict': Jay Cutler Says You're Overthinking Your Form – and Missing Out on Muscle. # 'I'm Not the Most Strict': Jay Cutler Says You're Overthinking Your Form – and Missing Out on Muscle. Bodybuilding legend Jay Cutler doesn’t buy into the idea that perfect form is always necessary to build muscle. Cutler still focuses on ‘feeling’ each rep and staying in control, but doesn’t shy away from using a little momentum to challenge his muscles – as seen in his approach to barbell curls. 'I’m not the most strict when I do my curls,' Cutler says in a YouTube video. Remember, I was throwing around crazy weights, and I always feel my movements. When curling, Cutler uses a slight swing at the bottom of the movement to help initiate the lift, but he doesn’t let momentum take over. Using a small amount of momentum allows him to handle heavier weights while still maintaining control, ensuring the key parts of the lift remain effective.

recentArticles.snippet: # Spurs roll past the Clippers 118-99 without Victor Wembanyama for 11th straight win. (AP) — De'Aaron Fox scored 22 points on 9-of-13 shooting, and the San Antonio Spurs beat the Los Angeles Clippers 118-99 on Thursday night without Victor Wembanyama in the lineup to win their 11th in a row. The Spurs had six players in double figures, including Stephon Castle with 20 points and Dylan Harper with 19 off the bench. Kawhi Leonard scored 24 points to lead the Clippers with his 53rd consecutive game of 20 or more points. This was the second straight year Madden Orlovsky's drawings were displayed on the ESPN show. recentArticles.title: Jack White, Arlo Parks, Anne Hathaway & More: New Music Friday Guide - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Jack White, Arlo Parks, Anne Hathaway & More: New Music Friday Guide. Billboard’s Friday Music Guide serves as a handy guide to New Music Friday’s most essential releases each week — the key music that everyone will be talking about today, and that will be dominating playlists this weekend and beyond. This week, Jack White prepares for his gig on *Saturday Night Live* with a punchy two-pack, Arlo Parks shares her gorgeous third album, *Ambiguous Desire*, and Anne Hathaway — ahem, Mother Mary — continues teasing her upcoming role as an iconic pop star in the A24 film of the same name… plus much more. Released as a surprise two-pack alongside single “Derecho Demonico,” it’s possible these could be the two songs Jack White will perform as musical guest on *Saturday Night Live* come April 4. “Time” comes as the latest single from Sofia D’Angelo — perhaps better known as a member of New York indie-pop collective MICHELLE — who in 2024 started releasing solo material again for the first time in four years.

recentArticles.title: Why Michael Jackson’s daughter, Paris, won’t stop ‘til she gets enough from his estate - The Conversation
recentArticles.snippet: She is asking a court to take a closer look at how the pop icon’s estate is being handled by its executors – the people responsible for managing it. Paris Jackson has accused executors John Branca and John McClain of paying themselves and the estate’s lawyers too much, and for leaving $464 million owned by the estate uninvested. Paris Jackson has also stated that the $150 million film is a “botched production.” The executors have responded by arguing that the application of their expertise to other productions about the singer has already provided a huge payoff to the estate. The executors also recently won a court battle against Paris Jackson that ended with a judge ordering her to pay their attorney’s fees in a related dispute. Like other executors in this situation, the men handling Jackson’s estate have hired lawyers, accountants and other professionals to assist them. In this case, Paris Jackson is complaining that the compensation paid to executors of her father’s estate has been excessive.

recentArticles.title: Howie Mandel doubles down on awkward apology to Kelly Ripa, Mark Consuelos: 'I look great' - ew.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Howie Mandel doubles down on awkward semi-apology after snapping at Mark Consuelos, Kelly Ripa on air. Mandel said it's "up to you to discern" whether or not his apology video was genuine, after he snapped at Ripa and Consuelos on "Live With Kelly and Mark.". Howie Mandel has doubled down on his awkward semi-apology to Kelly Ripa and Mark Consuelos, after the *America's Got Talent* host and comedian snapped at the cohosting couple live on the air. Days after sharing an Instagram video in which he partially apologized for scolding on television the *Live With Kelly and Mark* stars for praising his looks at age 70, Mandel added another layer of confusion to the ordeal in his answer to a podcaster's inquiry on the matter. In the comments section of Mandel's original apology video, longtime *Live* producer Michael Gelman shared his thoughts as he wrote, "During these divided times, one thing we can all agree upon is that you do look great ...For your age.".

recentArticles.title: NFL star Nacua in rehab, says attorney - Yahoo Sports
recentArticles.snippet: # NFL star Nacua in rehab, says attorney. Los Angeles Rams wide receiver Puka Nacua has checked himself into rehab, his attorney said Wednesday. The Rams star "voluntarily entered a private facility to focus on his health, personal growth, and overall development," lawyer Levi McCathern told AFP in a statement. Nacua topped the NFL with 129 receptions last season, adding a total of 1,715 yards, as the Rams reached the NFC Championship game before losing to eventual Super Bowl winners Seattle. Last month, a Jewish woman filed a lawsuit against Nacua alleging that he made an antisemitic statement and later bit her during a night out in Los Angeles on New Year's Eve. His lawyer said Nacua denies the allegation of antisemitism, calling it a "blatant lie," and describing the bite as "horseplay.". Nacua's decision to enter rehab was prior to and unrelated to the lawsuit, said the attorney.

recentArticles.snippet: # Seeing Steph Curry is a reminder Warriors have plenty left to play for. ## In a season marred by injuries, the Golden State Warriors still have stakes to play for with Stephen Curry on the mend and some ambitions for this season and next to realize and sustain. Curry hadn’t shot on the floor before a game — with the whole world watching — since the last game he played, January 30th, sixty days earlier. If Curry returns Sunday, the Warriors would have five regular-season games remaining to try to get organized for a play-in game on either April 14 or April 15. There was some hope — certainly from ESPN — that Curry could play in the nationally televised game on Wednesday night. Seeing Steph Curry is a reminder Warriors have plenty left to play for. In a season marred by injuries, the Golden State Warriors still have stakes to play for with Stephen Curry on the mend and some ambitions for this season and next to realize and sustain.

Puka Nacua is currently in a rehabilitation facility, according to his attorney Levi McCathern; Nacua was last month sued for assault and battery by a woman over allegations he made an antisemitic statement and bit her on New Year's Eve. Thursday 2 April 2026 06:45, UK. Los Angeles Rams All-Pro wide receiver Puka Nacua is in rehab and was there before he was sued for assault and battery by a woman who says he made an antisemitic statement and bit her on the shoulder on New Year's Eve, according to his attorney. Plaintiff Madison Atiabi and her attorney, Joseph Kar, claim Nacua made an antisemitic exclamation that emotionally distressed her when they were together on New Year's Eve. She says Nacua bit her and left teeth marks on her shoulder when they were in a van together later in the night, and she claims Nacua also bit her friend's thumb. ## Around Sky. + Sky Sports with no contract.

recentArticles.title: ‘The Bachelorette’ Star Konrad Bien-Stephen Dead at 35 - Variety Australia
recentArticles.snippet: # ‘The Bachelorette’ Star Konrad Bien-Stephen Dead at 35. Australian reality star Konrad Bien-Stephen has passed away at the age of 35. Bien-Stephen’s management confirmed the news in a statement this morning (April 2). It’s understood that Bien-Stephen passed away on Monday night (March 30) in Melbourne. No other details have been forthcoming at the time of writing. “It is with deep sadness that we share the news of the passing of Konrad Bien-Stephen,” the statement said. “We ask that you respect the privacy of their family during this incredibly difficult time. Bien-Stephen first rose to national fame as a contestant on Brooke Blurton’s season of “The Bachelorette” in 2021. Bien-Stephen famously dated fellow reality TV personality Abbie Chatfield from November 2021 to August 2022. Bien-Stephen’s last Instagram post came just six days ago, showing him on a job site. ## Love Film & TV? “The Amazing Race” contestant Luke O’Halloran said, “Love ya mate x.”.
recentArticles.summary: 澳洲實境秀明星Konrad Bien-Stephen於35歲逝世，死因未詳，此資訊與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Thursday news quiz: daring dogs, delinquent capybaras and far too many bananas - The Guardian
recentArticles.snippet: # Thursday news quiz: daring dogs, delinquent capybaras and far too many bananas. Test yourself on topical news trivia, pop culture and general knowledge every Thursday. It is time for the Thursday news quiz, where, thanks to our illustration from Anaïs Mims, you must decide whether you are gliding serenely across the waters of knowledge, your elegant neck forming a perfect question mark, or paddling furiously beneath the surface, one wrong answer away from an undignified flap. Fifteen questions on topical headlines, pop culture and general knowledge await. There are no prizes, but we always enjoy hearing how you got on in the comments. **The Thursday news quiz, No 241**. *If you really do think there has been an egregious error in one of the questions or answers – and can show your working and are absolutely 100% positive you aren’t attempting to factcheck a joke – you can complain about it in the comments below. ## Comments(…).

recentArticles.title: ‘Chicago Med’ Boss & Oliver Platt Talk Shocking Charles Ending (VIDEO) - TV Insider
recentArticles.snippet: # ‘Chicago Med’ Boss & Oliver Platt Talk Shocking Charles Ending (VIDEO). There have been quite a few cast changes over the years on *Chicago Med*, but now, in its 11th season, two OGs are still around: Oliver Platt and S. The former gets the spotlight in the Thursday, April 1 episode, “The Book of Charles,” and he’s delivering one of his best performances of the series. “Epatha and I were so traumatized shooting that scene,” Oliver Platt tells TV Insider. “Oliver and I particularly paid close attention to earlier in the season that Charles was having trouble with his medication, and he went to his doctor and tried to see what was going on.”. Watch the full video interview above for more from Oliver Platt and showrunner Allen MacDonald about this shocking development for Charles. * Who Is 'Chicago Med' Star Oliver Platt's Wife? * 'Chicago Med' Boss & Oliver Platt Preview 'Book of Charles' Episode. ## Chicago Med## Allen MacDonald## Oliver Platt## S.

recentArticles.title: Tom Clancy’s The Division® Resurgence Now Available Worldwide on iOS and Android Devices - Business Wire
recentArticles.snippet: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Ubisoft announced that Tom Clancy’s The Division Resurgence, a free-to-play third-person RPG shooter mobile game set in a massive urban open world, is now available worldwide\* on iOS and Android devices. Developed by a team of experts within Ubisoft Mobile Games,\*\* The Division Resurgence features a brand-new standalone campaign. SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Ubisoft® announced that Siege® X, the largest and most transformative update in Tom Clancy’s Rainbow Six Siege’s 10-year history, is now free to access on PlayStation®4, PlayStation®5, the Xbox One family of consoles, Xbox Series X | S, and Windows PC, including on Steam, and Amazon Luna\*. SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Ubisoft announced that Tom Clancy’s Rainbow Six Siege® X, the largest and most transformative evolution in the game’s history, will launch as a free update on June 10 on Ubisoft+, Ubisoft’s subscription service\*, PlayStation®4, PlayStation®5, the Xbox One family of consoles, Xbox Series X | S, Windows PC, including on Steam, and Amazon Luna.

周杰倫近日話題豐富，睽違四年將推新專輯，預告收錄求婚影片，並鬆口巡演最終站可能回台灣。他揭露當年向昆凌求婚的「假古堡」內幕，新歌MV斥資上億引發熱議。此外，他曾設計連川普都擁有的手錶，早期寫歌「罵方文山」也成經典。
周杰倫今日焦點圍繞新專輯《太陽之子》發行。主打歌MV斥資上億由《阿凡達》團隊打造，專輯中更收錄為小女兒Jacinda創作的《女兒殿下》，並預告將曝光他向昆凌求婚的浪漫影片。他還透露了求婚時的核彈級內幕，以及曾兩度恐慌症發作的經歷。此外，周董也鬆口未來巡演最終站可能回到台灣。
